title: search — Eloquent observers
description: Three owned observers on SearchIndex + SearchSyncJob + SearchSynonym. Enforce state machines, populate defaults at creation, and fan out lifecycle events afterCommit. SearchSavedQuery + SearchAnalyticsEvent do not need observers — SavedQuery is a simple CRUD entity, AnalyticsEvent is append-only and populated by the RecordSearchAnalyticsEventJob directly.

handles: creating → populate ULID prefix `sidx_`
creating → resolve workspace_id from WorkspacesResolver when caller didn't set it (null OK for platform-wide indexes)
creating → compute config_hash from field_specs + facet_specs + boost_specs + language
creating → generate index_name from model_class kebab-case + current_version=1 + live_alias=`{index_name}_live`
creating → default retention_tier from workspace plan entitlement
created  → fire SearchIndexRegistered (afterCommit)
updating → detect config_hash drift (comparing new compiled hash vs stored) — when different, flag a needs-reindex state via metadata.needs_reindex=true so admin dashboards can surface it
updating → when live_alias + current_version both change (from SwapIndexAliasJob), fire SearchIndexAliasSwapped (afterCommit)
deleting → fire SearchIndexUnregistered (afterCommit) and dispatch PurgeIndexModelJob delayed by `search.retention.swap_grace_days`
creating → populate ULID prefix `ssync_`, workspace_id, causer polymorphic pair
creating → resolve notify_channels + notify_locale (precedence: request > user setting > workspace setting > config default) and FREEZE on the row
creating → resolve retention_tier from workspace plan entitlement `search.analytics_retention_tier`
creating → default queue_name to config('search.queue.name', 'search')
created  → fire SearchSyncJobQueued (afterCommit)

updating → enforce status state-machine (queued→running, running→{succeeded|partially_succeeded|failed|cancelling}, cancelling→cancelled, terminals are terminal). Refuse invalid transitions with SEARCH_INVALID_STATE_TRANSITION.
updating → populate started_at on first queued→running, finished_at on transition to any terminal state, last_progress_at whenever counters change
updating → on status change fire the matching event (Started / Completed / Failed / Cancelled)
deleting → refuse hard-delete unless the caller is PruneSearchAnalyticsJob or platform admin (soft delete allowed for owner)
creating → populate ULID prefix `syn_`, workspace_id, created_by polymorphic pair
creating → default source='workspace_admin' unless the row is being seeded from #[SearchSynonym] (then source='attribute' + is_system=true)
creating → normalise `terms` (lowercase + trim + dedupe) before storage
created  → fire SearchSynonymCreated (afterCommit) + dispatch WarmSynonymCacheJob(workspace_id, language)
updated  → fire SearchSynonymUpdated (afterCommit) + dispatch WarmSynonymCacheJob
deleted  → fire SearchSynonymDeleted (afterCommit) + dispatch WarmSynonymCacheJob
restoring → fire SearchSynonymCreated (afterCommit) + dispatch WarmSynonymCacheJob
